title: 1 stock Warren Buffett’s firm has been buying
description: Warren Buffett’s company was a net seller of stocks in the final quarter of 2025. But one investment it did make caught Stephen Wright’s attention.The post 1 stock Warren Buffett’s firm has been buying appeared first on The Motley Fool UK.

title: RE/MAX Malta closes 2025 with a grand ‘Legacy of Leaders’ celebration
description: From left: Chairman Kevin Buttigieg, CCO Arnold Cini, CEO Sam Zammit and COO Lawrence Kelly.

title: Sudipto Sen’s Charak blocked by Central Board of Film Certification, filmmaker calls it ‘Uncomfortable truth’
description: The Kerala Story director Sudipto Sen’s new film Charak faces CBFC certification denial over occult themes like human sacrifice and cannibalism. “I do not have a clear idea why,” Sen told News18, open to cuts but hopeful for sympathetic review. Truth remains uncomfortable.

title: Andy Farrell’s man-management masterclass paid off against England
description: The sight of Andy Farrell punching the at Allianz Stadium air repeatedly and screaming in delight after Stuart McCloskey ran 50 metres back towards his own try-line to bundle Marcus Smith into touch late on, pretty much told the story of this game. Farrell vindicated. Ireland dominant. McCloskey unreal. England nowhere.

title: Beer industry to invest ₹5,500cr in UP by 2029
description: The Brewers' Association of India (BAI) has announced that the beer industry will invest around ₹5,500 crore in Uttar Pradesh over the next three years.

title: Bunbury crash: Female passenger on back of motorcycle dead following fatal crash
description: The 37-year-old was was rushed to hospital in a critical condition, where she later died from her injuries.

title: 'Ikkis': Sriram Raghavan wasn't happy with 'Pakistan not trustworthy' disclaimer
description: The recently released war drama Ikkis (2026) has been praised for its performances and emotional depth.

title: UP: 3 killed, 15 injured in head-on collision of buses
description: A tragic accident occurred on the Bareilly-Mathura highway in Budaun, Uttar Pradesh, early Sunday morning. A private bus carrying wedding guests collided head-on with a state-run roadways bus.
